items.title: Walt Disney, McDonald's, Palantir Set To Report Earnings
items.description: Key earnings this week will include PLTR, ON, AMD, CAT, & PFE. With Trump's revised tariff orders, investors will be keeping an eye on economic reports releasing next week.

items.title: Top economist Brad DeLong to recent college grads: Don’t blame AI for job struggles—blame the sputtering economy
items.description: "For the longer-run, the rise in the college wage premium is over, and a decline has (probably) begun," the Berkeley economist writes.

items.title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of August 3
items.description: See more weekly updates on Dividend Champions, Contenders & Challengers, including dividend changes, ex-dividend dates, and upcoming payment schedules.
